examples: Next time don't loll out your tongue out.
Don't loll about in the street after school.
Donkey:Yes, but how funny it is you loll your tongue out !
Overnight guests can loll about in four poster beds and roll top baths, enjoy candlelit dinners and peruse the family heirlooms at their leisure.
So I was left in peace during July and August to loll about Jesus Green, reading Churchill, bored, waiting for the weekend and the hike to the bus stop on the city boundary.
